title: gladiolus exilis
intro: Gladiolus exilis, also known as the small gladiolus or narrow-leaved sword lily, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Gladiolus exilis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote healing, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Gladiolus exilis can be made into teas, infusions, and ointments, allowing for a variety of applications in treating various ailments.
